title: Snapshots
subtitle: Shareable read-only snapshots of sessions
emptyDesc: Create a snapshot from a session to share a read-only view that doesn't change as the session continues.

confirmRevoke.title: Revoke this snapshot?
confirmRevoke.message: Anyone with the link will immediately lose access. This cannot be undone, but the snapshot record is kept.

confirmDelete.title: Delete this snapshot?
confirmDelete.message: The snapshot and its share link are permanently removed. This cannot be undone.

modal.title: Create snapshot
modal.subtitle: Capture this session as a read-only page you can share by link.
modal.titlePlaceholder: Optional — defaults to the session name
modal.redactionsHint: Hide sensitive data from the shared view. Redacted fields are stripped at capture time.
modal.successDesc: Share this read-only link. It won't change as the session continues.
modal.error: Could not create the snapshot. Please try again.

viewer.readOnlyDesc: This is a captured, shareable view of a session. It does not update live and has no controls.
viewer.redactedNote: Some data was redacted by the author:
viewer.unavailableTitle: This snapshot is no longer available
viewer.unavailableDesc: The link may have been revoked, expired, or never existed.
